name: Yae Miko
title: Astute Amusement
description: Lady Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine. Also serves as the editor-in-chief of Yae Publishing House. Unimaginable intelligence and cunning are hidden under her beautiful appearance.

normal.1: Summons forth kitsune spirits, initiating a maximum of 3 attacks that deal <electro>Electro DMG</electro>.

charged.1: Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to deal <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro> after a short casting time.

plunging.1: Plunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path with thunderous might. Deals <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro> upon impact with the ground.

description.0: To Yae, such dull tasks as can be accomplished by driving spirits out need not be done personally.
description.1: Moves swiftly, leaving a Sesshou Sakura behind.
5: Periodically strikes one nearby opponent with lightning, dealing <electro>Electro DMG</electro>
When there are other Sesshou Sakura nearby, their level will increase, boosting the DMG dealt by these lightning strikes.
description.8: A maximum of 3 Sesshou Sakura can exist simultaneously. The initial level of each Sesshou Sakura is 1, and the initial highest level each sakura can reach is 3. If a new Sesshou Sakura is created too close to an existing one, the existing one will be destroyed.
description.10: "The kitsune spirits sealed in the branches are all yakan who stooped to preying upon humans. The yakan are two grades lower than us Sky Kitsune, and so, I hardly see the problem with... asking that they do my bidding. Now, this doesn't mean that you humans should go learning from our grading systems, no indeed — and as for which of us, kitsune or human, is higher up in the pecking order... Heh, wouldn't you like to know?"

description.0: Legends of "kitsunetsuki," or the manifestation of a kitsune's might, are common in Inazuma's folktales. One that particularly captures the imagination is that of the Sky Kitsune, said to cause lightning to fall down upon the foes of the Grand Narukami Shrine. Summons a lightning strike, dealing <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro>.
description.1: When she uses this skill, Yae Miko will unseal nearby Sesshou Sakura, destroying their outer forms and transforming them into Tenko Thunderbolts that descend from the skies, dealing <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro>. Each Sesshou Sakura destroyed in this way will create one Tenko Thunderbolt.
description.3: Only at times like these will Yae reveal her Sky Kitsune form and wield lightning itself. None have seen the Lady Guuji's tails and lived to tell the story... so remember, as far as you are concerned, Lady Yae does not have a tail.

upgradedDescription.0: Legends of "kitsunetsuki," or the manifestation of a kitsune's might, are common in Inazuma's folktales. One that particularly captures the imagination is that of the Sky Kitsune, said to cause lightning to fall down upon the foes of the Grand Narukami Shrine. Summons a lightning strike, dealing <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro>.
upgradedDescription.1: When this is cast, Yae Miko will transform nearby Sesshou Sakura into Tenko Thunderbolts that descend from the skies, dealing <electro>AoE Electro DMG</electro>. Each Sesshou Sakura within range transforms into one Tenko Thunderbolt.
upgradedDescription.3: Only at times like these will Yae reveal her Sky Kitsune form and wield lightning itself. None have seen the Lady Guuji's tails and lived to tell the story... so remember, as far as you are concerned, Lady Yae does not have a tail.

description.0: When casting Great Secret Art: Tenko Kenshin, each Sesshou Sakura destroyed resets the cooldown for 1 charge of Yakan Evocation: Sesshou Sakura.

upgradedDescription.0: When Great Secret Art: Tenko Kenshin is unleashed, each Sesshou Sakura involved will reset the cooldown for one instance of Yakan Evocation: Sesshou Sakura.
upgradedDescription.1: When there are at least 3 Sesshou Sakura nearby at the same time, unleashing Yakan Evocation: Sesshou Sakura will cause Yae Miko to unleash an additional lightning strike which deals Electro DMG at 40% of her ATK.
upgradedDescription.2: Radiance: Stellar-Conduct: The aforementioned additional lightning strike becomes an instance of Electro DMG at 50% of Yae Miko's ATK instead. This DMG will also be considered Stellar-Conduct DMG.

description.0: Every point of Elemental Mastery Yae Miko possesses will increase Sesshou Sakura DMG by 0.15%.
Has a 25% chance to get 1 regional Character Talent Material (base material excluded) when crafting. The rarity is that of the base material.

Extends the duration of the Sesshou Sakura by 10s. When a nearby party member triggers a Superconduct or Stellar-Conduct reaction, the next instance of Sesshou Sakura lightning is enhanced as follows: DMG dealt is increased at 80% of Yae Miko's ATK. This effect can trigger once every 2.5s.
description.1: Radiance: Stellar-Conduct: An enhanced Sesshou Sakura lightning bolt hit on an opponent will also cause an additional instance of Electro DMG at 200% of Yae Miko's ATK. This DMG is considered Stellar-Conduct DMG.
description.2: Additionally, when inside a Polestar Field, Yae Miko will enter the Radiance: Stellar-Conduct state.

description.0: Each time Great Secret Art: Tenko Kenshin activates a Tenko Thunderbolt, Yae Miko will restore 8 Elemental Energy for herself.

upgradedDescription.0: Each time Great Secret Art: Tenko Kenshin activates a Tenko Thunderbolt, Yae Miko restores 8 Elemental Energy to herself. After Yae Miko triggers a Superconduct or Stellar-Conduct reaction, or deals Stellar-Conduct DMG, nearby party members will gain a 50% Electro DMG and Stellar-Conduct DMG Bonus for 10s. Triggering these reactions again will refresh the duration of the DMG bonuses.

description.0: Sesshou Sakura start at Level 2 when created, their max level is increased to 4, and their attack range is increased by 60%.

upgradedDescription.0: Sesshou Sakura start at Level 2 when created, their max level is increased to 4, and their attack range is increased by 60%. Additionally, when there are Sesshou Sakura in the field, Yae Miko's and your current active character's Elemental Mastery will also be increased by 60/90/120/200 points, depending on the level of the Sesshou Sakura.

description.0: Increases the Level of Yakan Evocation: Sesshou Sakura by 3.
When Sesshou Sakura lightning hits opponents, the Electro DMG Bonus of all nearby party members is increased by 20% for 5s.

upgradedDescription.0: When Sesshou Sakura lightning hits opponents, the Electro DMG Bonus of all nearby party members is increased by 20% for 5s, and Yae Miko regenerates 8 Elemental Energy. The aforementioned Elemental Energy recovery effect can trigger once every 5s. Additionally, Yae Miko's Elemental Burst DMG is increased by 100%.

description.0: Increases the Level of Great Secret Art: Tenko Kenshin by 3.
The Sesshou Sakura's attacks will ignore 60% of the opponents' DEF.

upgradedDescription.0: Sesshou Sakura's attacks will ignore 60% of the opponents' DEF. The CRIT DMG of Yae Miko's Stellar-Conduct DMG is increased by 200%.
